image:image.image:caption: Friends of Oceano Dunes logo

image:image.image:title: Painting of Oceano Dunes history: Spanish explorers on a dune ridge
image:image.image:caption: Painting of Oceano Dunes history: Spanish explorers on a dune ridge, a skinny bear at the water, and a lantern-lit Dunites driftwood cabin

image:image.image:caption: Fifth wheel trailer camped on the beach at dusk

image:image.image:title: Wide view of RVs and campers along the beach with Pismo hills behind

image:image.image:title: Wooden trail sign for the CCWheelers Gift Shop at Oceano Dunes
image:image.image:caption: Wooden trail sign for the CCWheelers Gift Shop at Oceano Dunes, California, standing in the sand dunes at sunset

image:image.image:title: CCWheelers presents The Sunset Collection: a couple in Oceano Dunes crop hoodies sittin...
image:image.image:caption: CCWheelers presents The Sunset Collection: a couple in Oceano Dunes crop hoodies sitting by a beach campfire at sunset, a UTV parked on the sand behind them, Oceano Dunes California

image:image.image:title: Seven dogs wearing Ruff Riders bandanas lined up on the beach in front of a row of dune...
